facts.claim: Liverpool is a port city and metropolitan borough in Merseyside, England. It is situated on the eastern side of the Mersey Estuary, near the Irish Sea, 178 miles (286 km) north-west of London. It had a population of 508,961 in 2024[4] and is the administrative, cultural and economic centre of the Liverpool City Region, a combined authority area with a population of over 1.5 million.[6]
